title: Quotes CRM Workflow Templates
excerpt: Hi, is there a way to add just a text line on the quote template (or when creating a quote) where I can remove the unit price & total price but still staying within the Product and Service Pricing Table .  I am finding t…

posts.author: AdminDG (DG Engineering )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, is there a way to add just a text line on the quote template (or when creating a quote) where I can remove the unit price & total price but still staying within the Product and Service Pricing Table . I am finding the quoting system limiting when it comes to funtionality of adding in extra information needed witin the quote.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
That’s a great suggestion, I’d recommend putting it on the feature suggestion board. Feature requests - monday Community Forum

The quoting tool itself is still in a growing phase. My team doesn’t use it yet, I’ve built out our own using subitems and docugen. Every month or two I try out the quoting tool and it’s getting better each time! I hope to be able to change to it at some point.
